prerequisites: An OpenAQ Explorer account (sign up at https://explore.openaq.org/register).
An OpenAQ API key, which is generated for your account and viewable in your account settings.
The numeric OpenAQ country ID(s) you want to ingest, found via the OpenAQ Countries resource (each country has a numeric id).

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: OpenAQ authenticates every API request with an API key. Provide it in the connector's api_key field. OpenAQ sends the key in the X-API-Key request header. Obtain the key by signing up at explore.openaq.org and viewing it in your account settings; treat it like a password and do not share it.

setupSteps.title: Create an OpenAQ account
setupSteps.body: Sign up for an OpenAQ Explorer account at https://explore.openaq.org/register. An API key is required for all OpenAQ API requests.

setupSteps.title: Get your API key
setupSteps.body: After signing up, open your OpenAQ Explorer account settings at https://explore.openaq.org/account and copy your API key. If the key is ever compromised, you can request a replacement from the same account settings.

setupSteps.title: Set the api_key field
setupSteps.body: Paste your OpenAQ API key into the connector's required api_key field. The connector sends it to OpenAQ in the X-API-Key header on each request.

setupSteps.title: Set the country_ids field
setupSteps.body: Provide the required country_ids field with the numeric OpenAQ country ID(s) you want to extract. Discover available IDs using the OpenAQ Countries resource (GET https://api.openaq.org/v3/countries); each country object has an id, a code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2), and a name.

sources.title: OpenAQ Docs - Quick start (API key authentication)
